data.name: Bare Witness
data.detailed_description:
Starting a new life is difficult enough. Moving to upstate New York for art school was a change you looked forward to. But you've got a history, and you quickly discover you can't quite leave that history behind. This is an adult visual novel with many paths (and 11 primary endings!) and lots of replay potential. Pursue solo relationships with each of the girls, or a poly relationship with a select few!



This is a pure visual novel experience: No grind, no minigames, no free-roam, and no sandbox. Just a story where you take control of the narrative and engage only those love interests you're most enamored of. When the game is done, start up again and seek out new roads to take and new romances to play out!



Enjoy wholesome romance in your adult games? Bare Witness has you covered: with all the face-touching, hand-holding, and affirmations of love you can handle! Fans have called it: "Engaging," "heartwarming," "a masterpiece," and "an emotional rollercoaster." One player said "Bare Witness will leave a hole in your life once you're done playing." Another wrote "This game is fire: Breathes you in, sucks up all the oxygen in and around you, then burns you to a crisp in a matter of minutes."

Yeah, we think they're nuts, too, but you might agree with them! Only one way to know...

data.short_description: Bare Witness is an adult visual novel set at the fictional Plattsburgh College of the Arts in New York. With lots of potential branching paths and 11 primary endings, you may find yourself returning again and again to pursue one or more of the six love interests that catch your eye.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文, 義大利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: Bare Witness, the Bare Witness logo, AlterWorlds, and the AlterWorlds logo are trademarks of AlterWorlds, LC. Bare Witness is copyright AlterWorlds, LC. All rights are reserved.

  • Storage: 6 GB available space
